arts.ttl: Barcelona on alert as Bayer Leverkusen make contact for Rennes star

arts.ttl: Official | Hull City sign Eliot Matazo from AS Monaco
arts.sum: Hull City FC have signed AS Monaco midfielder Eliot Matazo (22), both clubs have announced. The 22-year-old has put pen to paper over a three-and-a-half-year contract with the Tigers, who…

arts.ttl: Marseille enter talks with Rennes for Amine Gouiri
arts.sum: Olympique de Marseille are looking to sign a replacement for outgoing forward striker Elye Wahi (24), who is set to join Bundesliga side Eintracht Frankfurt imminently on a permanent move.…

arts.ttl: AS Monaco nearing agreement to sign Eintracht Frankfurt’s Éric Dina Ebimbe
arts.sum: As reported by Foot Mercato, AS Monaco are in advanced discussions to sign Eintracht Frankfurt midfielder Éric Junior Dina Ebimbe (24). RMC Sport understands that there is already an agreement in principle between…

arts.ttl: Eliot Matazo absent from Monaco training ahead of impending Hull City transfer
arts.sum: Eliot Matazo (22) was absent from AS Monaco training on Friday ahead of his impending move to EFL Championship side Hull City. As previously reported by L’Équipe, Monaco have agreed a €2m…

arts.ttl: Rennes’ Mikayil Faye subject of Bayer Leverkusen approach
arts.sum: Mikayil Faye (20) has been the subject of an approach from Bundesliga side Bayer Leverkusen, just six months after signing for Stade Rennais, according to a report from Fabrizio Romano. Faye…

arts.ttl: Former Monaco and Nantes boss Claudio Ranieri to retire at the end of this season
arts.sum: A managerial career spanning nearly four decades will end when the 2024-25 season concludes. On Friday, Claudio Ranieri announced to RAI Sport that he would officially retire. The 73-year-old Italian…

arts.ttl: Celtic close to Kyogo sale and Jota return from Rennes
arts.sum: Celtic manager Brendan Rodgers expects the sale of Kyogo Furuhashi to Rennes and the return of Jota from the French club to be completed within the next 24 hours.

arts.ttl: AS Monaco’s Wilfried Singo set for period of absence with injury
arts.sum: Wilfried Singo (24) is set for a period on the sidelines after picking up an injury against Aston Villa in midweek. The Ivory Coast international netted the winner against Aston…

arts.ttl: Jota and Kyogo Celtic in and out from Rennes latest as Brendan Rodgers reveals adored striker wanted to leave
arts.sum: The Irishman is preparing to lose one man and welcome back another familiar face
